entry.title: IDC N0002400D6000 (P00302) awarded to ELECTRONIC DATA SYSTEMS CORPOR, was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: THE PURPOSE OF THIS MODIFICATION IS TO INCORPORATE A BILATERAL AGREEMENT TO CHANGE THE ENTERPRISE LEVEL MEASURES FOR PROGRAM YEAR 2008.

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: NO - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS NOT USED.

entry.title: IDC N0002400D6000 (P00303) awarded to ELECTRONIC DATA SYSTEMS CORPOR, was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: THE PURPOSES OF THIS MODIFICATION ARE TO 1) ADD CLIN 0152DS TO TABLES EIGHT THROUGH TEN AND TO 2) MODIFY THE DESCRIPTION OF CLIN 0152DR.

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: NO - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS NOT USED.
